title: Steel prices, news & market analysis | Argus Media
summary: Italian and German steel mills signaled to buyers at a major industry event in Dusseldorf that they will increase offers by €50-70/t ($59-82.50/t) next week. German rebar producers indicated offers around €710/t delivered, €50/t higher than recent levels. A large Italian mill expects increases higher than €50/t, with recent offers at €670-680/t delivered in Poland.

title: Steel - Price - Chart - Historical Data - News
summary: Steel fell to 3,097 CNY/T on April 17, 2026, down 0.19% from the previous day, though up 2.45% year-over-year. Steel rebar futures climbed above CNY 3,100 per ton to a two-week high due to firm seasonal demand and restocking. China Steel Corp. raised domestic prices for next month by NT$1,000 to NT$1,200 per ton, its fifth consecutive increase.

title: HRC Steel - Price - Chart - Historical Data - News
summary: HRC Steel rose to 1,105 USD/T on April 17, 2026, up 0.36% from the previous day, reaching the highest since January 2024. Over the past 4 weeks, Hot-Rolled Coil Steel gained 4.99%. Prices increased to 1,100.00 USD/T, reflecting strong recent momentum.

title: Lloyds Metals & Energy Turns to Metso for Filtration Technology
summary: Metso Corp. has been selected by Lloyds Metals & Energy Ltd. for filtration technology implementation. This represents a recent advancement in steel production technology adoption.

title: Danieli, Tenova's ENERGIRON ZR Technology Sets Record in Energy Efficiency at Suez Steel's DRP
summary: Danieli announced that its jointly developed ENERGIRON Zero-Reformer (ZR) technology with Tenova achieved a record in energy efficiency for gas-based reduction at Suez Steel's direct reduction plant. This breakthrough demonstrates significant progress in sustainable steelmaking processes.

title: Indo-aus Team Shows Farm Waste Can Cut Steel Emissions
source: Steel Industry News & Intelligence / Northern Miner
summary: An India-Australia research partnership successfully tested agricultural waste, such as rice husk pellets, as a coal substitute in steel production. The project aims to reduce carbon dioxide output by up to 50 percent, offering a significant pathway to cut emissions from India's growing steel industry.

title: Chilean miner Codelco’s El Teniente smelter to restart after collapse
summary: Chilean miner Codelco’s smelter at its El Teniente mine is set to restart on Thursday after a collapse. This development could impact copper supply from one of the world's largest producers. The restart is anticipated to support ongoing market stability amid fluctuating prices.

title: Ivanhoe Mines Reports 71,417 Tonnes of Copper in Anode Produced by Kamoa-Kakula in Q1 2026; Recovery Efforts Advancing
summary: Ivanhoe Mines announced that the Kamoa-Kakula Copper Complex produced 71,417 tonnes of copper in anode during Q1 2026. Africa's largest copper smelter has ramped up to 60% capacity, with improving sales of 99.7%-pure anodes and by-product high-strength sulphuric acid. The Phase 1, 2, and 3 concentrators are set to reach a combined steady-state rate of 17 million tonnes per annum, with revised guidance for over 500,000 tonnes of copper per annum from 2028.

title: Codelco targets higher 2027 output to reclaim top copper spot
summary: Codelco is aiming for increased copper output in 2027 to regain its position as the world's top producer. The company seeks to reverse a prolonged decline in production amid global supply challenges. This move highlights efforts to boost capacity in response to rising demand.

title: Nickel - Price - Chart - Historical Data - News
summary: Nickel fell to 18,035 USD/T on April 17, 2026, down 1.42% from the previous day. Over the past month, prices rose 5.10%, and are up 14.54% year-over-year. Futures recently hit $18,550 per tonne amid cost pressures and supply constraints.

title: Live Nickel Prices Today
summary: Nickel prices advanced 1.88% to $18,516.64 per ton globally, supported by tightening supply from Indonesia's reduced ore quotas. Demand recovery in Chinese EV batteries and stainless steel provides strength, though tiered royalties cap upside potential. Prices remain range-bound and policy-driven.

title: Nickel Futures Price Today
summary: Nickel futures traded at 18,025.00, down from previous close of 18,259.25. UBS warns of persistent surplus through 2026 despite production cuts, maintaining a bearish outlook.

title: World's Biggest Nickel Mine in Indonesia Told to Slash Output
summary: The world's biggest nickel mine, PT Weda Bay Nickel in Indonesia, has been notified to cut its ore production quota to 12 million tons this year from 42 million tons in 2025. This move aims to boost global prices of nickel, Indonesia's key export commodity. Nickel prices climbed last month following Indonesia's plans to reduce mine output.

title: Nickel futures rise on Indonesia quota cut and supply constraints
summary: Nickel futures rose to around $18,550 per tonne, the highest in three months, due to cost pressures and supply constraints in Indonesia. Jakarta revised its nickel ore benchmark pricing formula and signaled continued production discipline for 2026 quotas at 190–200 million tons. Prices stabilized in the $17,000–$17,400 range amid elevated global inventories and projected surplus.

title: Prysmian's Stock Rises Amid U.S. Copper Tariff Developments
summary: Prysmian shares rose 4% following U.S. President Donald Trump's announcement of a 50% tariff on imported copper. The tariff announcement favors Prysmian's local sourcing strategy and enhances its market position in the copper cable sector.

title: Prysmian unlocks advanced submarine cables, boosting...
summary: Prysmian explores next-generation submarine energy cables with 525kV capacity qualified to operate at temperatures up to 90°C. This advancement represents progress in submarine cable technology for energy transmission.
